seoTitle: HubSpot Sequences: What They Are & How to Set Up
metaDescription: Learn what HubSpot Sequences are and how to build one, combining automated emails and manual sales tasks with personalization and unenrollment rules.
intro: A HubSpot Sequence is a scheduled series of one-to-one emails and manual sales tasks, built for personal outreach rather than bulk marketing blasts. This guide explains how sequences differ from regular workflows and walks through building one, from arranging automated emails and call reminders to setting unenrollment rules. It ends with reviewing reply rates once your sequence is live.

steps.heading: Understand what a sequence is
steps.body: Recognize that Sequences combine personalized emails with manual tasks like calls, unlike bulk marketing automation.

steps.heading: Open the Sequences editor
steps.body: Go to Automation in your Sales dashboard and open the Sequences directory.

steps.heading: Start a new sequence
steps.body: Click Create Sequence and choose to build from scratch or start from a template.

steps.heading: Add steps to your canvas
steps.body: Arrange automated email triggers and follow-up intervals, plus manual tasks like calls or LinkedIn touchpoints.

steps.heading: Personalize your content
steps.body: Use personalization tokens so emails auto-fill contact and company details.

steps.heading: Set unenrollment rules and launch
steps.body: Configure unenrollment triggers, sending windows, and enroll your target contacts to start the sequence.

faq.question: How is a sequence different from a workflow?
faq.answer: Sequences are built for personalized, one-to-one outreach that mixes emails with manual sales tasks, while workflows handle broader marketing automation.

faq.question: Will a contact keep getting emails after they reply?
faq.answer: No, unenrollment triggers stop automated emails the moment a prospect replies.

faq.question: Can I include manual tasks like phone calls in a sequence?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add manual task steps such as call reminders or LinkedIn outreach alongside automated emails.

faq.question: Where do I track how a sequence is performing?
faq.answer: The sequence dashboard shows analytics on reply rates, open rates, and meetings booked.
